requirement_topic.en: CEB Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: CEB BESS并网——50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: CEB BESS併網——50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: The Central Electricity Board (CEB) is the national utility and grid operator in Mauritius, operating under the Central Electricity Board Act. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale storage tendered under CEB renewable-integration programmes and behind-the-meter projects — require CEB technical review and grid-connection approval. Mauritius's grid operates at 50 Hz, 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase (BS/IEC nominal, inherited from British legacy), with voltage tolerance per BS EN 50160 equivalent. CEB has issued grid-scale BESS tenders as part of its renewable energy integration strategy to absorb solar generation peaks; project specifications for these tenders reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series including IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems). A dedicated, publicly accessible CEB technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed from official public sources as of the dataset date — project-specific connection agreement terms and tender technical specifications must be obtained directly from CEB. The URA (Utility Regulatory Authority), established under the Utility Regulatory Authority Act 2004, provides overarching economic regulation and licence oversight for electricity storage activities; URA approval or notification may be required depending on project size and offtake arrangement.
summary.zh: 中央电力局（CEB）是毛里求斯的国家电力公司和电网运营商，依据《中央电力局法》运作。所有并网BESS装置——包括在CEB可再生能源整合计划下招标的公用事业规模储能和表后项目——均须取得CEB技术审查和并网批准。毛里求斯电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相230 V、三相400 V（BS/IEC标称值，源于英国传统），电压容差参考BS EN 50160等效标准。CEB已发布电网规模BESS招标，作为其整合可再生能源、吸收太阳能发电峰值战略的一部分；上述招标的项目规格引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列，包括IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方公开来源确认CEB专门针对BESS并网的独立公开技术规格文件——项目专属并网协议条款和招标技术规格须直接向CEB获取。URA（公用事业监管局），依据《公用事业监管局法》2004年设立，对储能活动提供全面的经济监管和许可监督；视项目规模和购售电安排而定，可能须取得URA批准或申报。
summary.zht: 中央電力局（CEB）是模里西斯的國家電力公司和電網運營商，依據《中央電力局法》運作。所有併網BESS裝置——包括在CEB可再生能源整合計畫下招標的公用事業規模儲能和表後項目——均須取得CEB技術審查和併網批准。模里西斯電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相230 V、三相400 V（BS/IEC標稱值，源於英國傳統），電壓容差參考BS EN 50160等效標準。CEB已發布電網規模BESS招標，作為其整合可再生能源、吸收太陽能發電峰值戰略的一部分；上述招標的項目規格引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列，包括IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方公開來源確認CEB專門針對BESS併網的獨立公開技術規格文件——項目專屬併網協議條款和招標技術規格須直接向CEB獲取。URA（公用事業監管局），依據《公用事業監管局法》2004年設立，對儲能活動提供全面的經濟監管和許可監督；視項目規模和購售電安排而定，可能須取得URA批准或申報。

standards_or_laws: Central Electricity Board Act (Mauritius) — statutory basis for CEB as grid operator and connection authority
Utility Regulatory Authority Act 2004 (Mauritius) — URA as economic regulator for electricity including storage activities
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference in CEB tenders)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference in CEB tenders)
BS EN 50160 — Voltage characteristics of electricity supplied by public electricity networks (IEC/BS-aligned voltage quality reference for Mauritius 230/400 V 50 Hz grid)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase — a nominal voltage difference compared with Mauritius's 230/400 V. Both systems share 50 Hz frequency, which eliminates frequency-related reconfiguration, but PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and reactive-power management parameters configured for China's 220/380 V must be reviewed and adjusted for Mauritius's 230/400 V. SCADA and communication protocol requirements for CEB integration must also be confirmed separately.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相220 V、三相380 V——与毛里求斯230/400 V存在标称电压差。两个系统共享50 Hz频率，无需频率相关重新配置，但针对中国220/380 V配置的PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数和无功功率管理参数须针对毛里求斯230/400 V进行审查和调整。CEB集成的SCADA和通信协议要求亦须单独确认。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相220 V、三相380 V——與模里西斯230/400 V存在標稱電壓差。兩個系統共享50 Hz頻率，無需頻率相關重新配置，但針對中國220/380 V配置的PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數和無功功率管理參數須針對模里西斯230/400 V進行審查和調整。CEB集成的SCADA和通訊協議要求亦須單獨確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy CEB's grid-connection requirements. Key issues requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Mauritius is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; both are 50 Hz so no frequency reconfiguration is required, but PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reviewed and, where necessary, adjusted and retested for 230/400 V operation; (b) CEB project-specific connection agreement terms — engage CEB at the earliest project stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised, particularly for utility-scale BESS responding to CEB renewable-integration tenders; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where CEB tender specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly, as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) URA licensing — confirm whether the project size or commercial arrangement triggers a URA licence or notification obligation before project execution; (e) SCADA and communication protocols — confirm the communication interface protocol required by CEB for BESS monitoring and dispatch (IEC 61850, DNP3, or project-specific specification); (f) coastal environmental derating — Mauritius is an island in a cyclone-active zone with high salt-mist exposure; CEB site acceptance criteria may specify IEC 60721 salt-mist class requirements and wind-load compliance for outdoor BESS enclosures.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足CEB并网要求。需注意的主要问题：（a）电网电压——毛里求斯为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；两者均为50 Hz无需频率重新配置，但PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须针对230/400 V运行进行审查，必要时调整并重新测试；（b）CEB项目专属并网协议条款——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与CEB接触以获取技术要求，尤其是响应CEB可再生能源整合招标的公用事业规模BESS；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若CEB招标规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）URA许可——在项目执行前确认项目规模或商业安排是否触发URA许可或申报义务；（e）SCADA和通信协议——确认CEB对BESS监控和调度所要求的通信接口协议（IEC 61850、DNP3或项目专属规格）；（f）沿海环境降额——毛里求斯是台风活跃区域的岛国，具有高盐雾暴露；CEB现场验收标准可能对户外BESS机柜规定IEC 60721盐雾等级要求和抗风载合规要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足CEB併網要求。需注意的主要問題：（a）電網電壓——模里西斯為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；兩者均為50 Hz無需頻率重新配置，但PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須針對230/400 V運行進行審查，必要時調整並重新測試；（b）CEB項目專屬併網協議條款——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與CEB接觸以獲取技術要求，尤其是響應CEB可再生能源整合招標的公用事業規模BESS；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若CEB招標規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）URA許可——在項目執行前確認項目規模或商業安排是否觸發URA許可或申報義務；（e）SCADA和通訊協議——確認CEB對BESS監控和調度所要求的通訊接口協議（IEC 61850、DNP3或項目專屬規格）；（f）沿海環境降額——模里西斯是颱風活躍區域的島國，具有高鹽霧暴露；CEB現場驗收標準可能對戶外BESS機箱規定IEC 60721鹽霧等級要求和抗風載合規要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CEB grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Mauritius; URA licensing or notification may be required depending on project scale and arrangement; project-specific technical requirements are defined in CEB connection agreements and tender specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Mauritius

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy CEB's Mauritius grid-connection requirements. Mauritius and China share 50 Hz frequency, but BESS PCS must be reviewed and adjusted for Mauritius's 230/400 V grid versus China's 220/380 V. Engage CEB at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, SCADA/communication protocol specifications, and coastal environmental derating criteria. Confirm URA licensing obligations before project execution. No publicly accessible CEB technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct CEB and URA engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足CEB毛里求斯并网要求。毛里求斯和中国共享50 Hz频率，但BESS储能变流器须针对毛里求斯230/400 V电网（对比中国220/380 V）进行审查和调整。应在项目最早阶段与CEB接触，确定并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据、SCADA/通信协议规格及沿海环境降额标准。在项目执行前确认URA许可义务。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认CEB公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与CEB和URA接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足CEB模里西斯併網要求。模里西斯和中國共享50 Hz頻率，但BESS儲能變流器須針對模里西斯230/400 V電網（對比中國220/380 V）進行審查和調整。應在項目最早階段與CEB接觸，確定併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據、SCADA/通訊協議規格及沿海環境降額標準。在項目執行前確認URA許可義務。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認CEB公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與CEB和URA接觸至關重要。
